title: Inline template name editing and delete with confirmation

requirements.summary: Create a useUpdateWorkoutTemplateName mutation hook that calls the backend updateWorkoutTemplateName function and invalidates the allWorkoutTemplates query on success
acceptanceCriteria: Hook file exists at frontend/src/hooks/useUpdateWorkoutTemplateName.ts
Calls the backend actor's updateWorkoutTemplateName with the template ID and new name
Invalidates allWorkoutTemplates query on success

file_operations.description: Create a mutation hook that calls actor.updateTemplateName(templateId, newName), handles errors (returning null on success or error message on failure), invalidates the 'allWorkoutTemplates' query key on success, and shows appropriate error handling for authentication and backend failures

requirements.summary: Create a useDeleteWorkoutTemplate mutation hook that calls the backend deleteWorkoutTemplate function and invalidates the allWorkoutTemplates query on success
acceptanceCriteria: Hook file exists at frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteWorkoutTemplate.ts
Calls the backend actor's deleteWorkoutTemplate with the template ID
Invalidates allWorkoutTemplates query on success

file_operations.description: Create a mutation hook that calls actor.deleteTemplate(templateId), handles the returned Option<string> error result (null means success, Some(error) means failure), invalidates the 'allWorkoutTemplates' query key on success, and provides detailed error handling for authentication and backend failures

requirements.summary: In the TemplateLibraryPage (on-chain templates) template list view, make each template name clickable to enter inline edit mode with save on Enter/blur and cancel on Escape
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a template name in the list switches it to an editable text input
The input is pre-filled with the current template name
Pressing Enter commits the change and exits edit mode
Clicking outside (onBlur) commits the change and exits edit mode
Pressing Escape cancels the edit without saving
A loading state is shown while the mutation is in flight
A success toast is shown when the name is updated
An error toast is shown if the update fails

file_operations.description: In the template list view section, add state to track which template ID is being edited and the current edit value. Replace the template name display with a conditional render: if editing that template, show a text input pre-filled with the name; otherwise show the name as a clickable button/span. Wire up onClick to enter edit mode, onKeyDown to handle Enter (save via useUpdateWorkoutTemplateName and exit edit mode) and Escape (cancel and exit edit mode), and onBlur to save and exit edit mode. Show a loading spinner next to the input while the mutation isPending. Use toast for success/error feedback after mutation

requirements.summary: In the TemplateLibraryPage (on-chain templates) template list view, add a Delete button with confirmation dialog next to each template
acceptanceCriteria: A Delete button is visible for each template in the list
Clicking Delete opens a confirmation dialog with a clear warning message
Confirming in the dialog calls the deleteWorkoutTemplate mutation
Cancelling the dialog closes it without deleting
A success toast is shown when the template is deleted
An error toast is shown if the deletion fails
The deleted template is removed from the list after successful deletion

file_operations.description: In the template list view section, add a Delete button next to each template. Add state to track which template is selected for deletion. Import and use the Shadcn UI AlertDialog component (check existing usage in other files for the exact component path under frontend/src/components/ui). Wire the Delete button to open the AlertDialog with a confirmation message (e.g., 'Are you sure you want to permanently delete this template? This action cannot be undone.'). On confirm, call the useDeleteWorkoutTemplate mutation with the template ID and show a success or error toast based on the result. On cancel, close the dialog without action

requirements.summary: In the LocalTemplatesPage (localStorage templates), make each template name support inline editing with save on Enter/blur and cancel on Escape
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a local template name in the list switches it to an editable text input
The input is pre-filled with the current template name
Pressing Enter commits the change and exits edit mode
Clicking outside (onBlur) commits the change and exits edit mode
Pressing Escape cancels the edit without saving

file_operations.description: In the local template list view section, add state to track which template ID is being edited and the current edit value. Replace the template name display with a conditional render: if editing that template, show a text input pre-filled with the name; otherwise show the name as a clickable button/span. Wire up onClick to enter edit mode, onKeyDown to handle Enter (save via the useLocalTemplates update mutation and exit edit mode) and Escape (cancel and exit edit mode), and onBlur to save and exit edit mode. No loading state is needed for localStorage mutations

requirements.summary: In the LocalTemplatesPage (localStorage templates), add a Delete button with confirmation dialog next to each template
acceptanceCriteria: A Delete button is visible for each local template in the list
Clicking Delete opens a confirmation dialog
Confirming deletes the template from localStorage
Cancelling the dialog closes it without deleting
The deleted template is removed from the list after successful deletion

file_operations.description: In the local template list view section, add a Delete button next to each template. Add state to track which template is selected for deletion. Import and use the Shadcn UI AlertDialog component (check existing usage in other files for the exact component path under frontend/src/components/ui). Wire the Delete button to open the AlertDialog with a confirmation message (e.g., 'Are you sure you want to permanently delete this local template? This action cannot be undone.'). On confirm, call the useLocalTemplates delete mutation with the template ID. On cancel, close the dialog without action
